#  Analytics 2.0 Report Pages 
Table of Contents 
##  Financials Budget (Custom) Report 
Gain a flexible perspective on your budget data with Procore's Financials Budget custom report. [Customize](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/analytics-company/tutorials/configure-custom-budget-report) the view to prioritize the information most relevant to your role and project needs. This report consolidates crucial financial aspects, empowering you to effectively track and analyze budget performance for better project control.
### Current Versions
  * 2.0 - 25.03.13


### Procore Tools Used in the Financials Budget Report
  * Budget
  * Change Events
